category_sources: source_facts.description describes libpaper as a library for handling paper characteristics.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as libpaper.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project; its README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/rrthomas/libpaper, so repo is null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies paper characteristics handling; source_facts.executables lists paper and paperconf utilities.
